final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a 9:16 screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring a streamer.

Style/medium: needs a mobile livestream interface aesthetic — exact UI styling and overlay design is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical framing, typical mobile livestream layout with streamer centered, interactive elements visible
Subject: must include a female streamer (神仙姐姐) holding a sign
Scene/backdrop: must include a livestream room setting with typical Douyin live interface elements (comments, gifts, viewer count)
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, engaging livestream atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign she is holding
Constraints: must be 9:16 aspect ratio, must preserve the verbatim sign text exactly as given
Avoid:
